# MMADads.com

## About
MMADads.com is a blog and resource site for dads who love mixed martial arts, with a special focus on women's MMA. The site covers fight night guides, family-friendly MMA content, women's division analysis, training guides for families, fighter profiles, and gear recommendations.

## Mission
To celebrate MMA -- especially the criminally underrated women's divisions -- and share the sport with families. Women's MMA is must-watch television and more dads should know it.

## Content
- Blog posts covering women's MMA, fight night setup, family training, UFC analysis, and fighter profiles
- 15 long-form articles (900+ words each) written from the perspective of an MMA dad
- Affiliate partnerships with UFC Fight Pass, Venum, and DraftKings (tag: mmadads-20)

## Key Topics
- Women's MMA (Amanda Nunes, Valentina Shevchenko, Zhang Weili, Rose Namajunas, Julianna Pena, and more)
- Watching UFC with family: age-appropriate guides, how to talk about the sport
- Home gym setup for MMA families
- Getting kids into martial arts
- Fight night party hosting
- MMA betting basics
- UFC fighters who are fathers
- Best fights to watch with kids

## Site Structure
- Homepage: Hero, featured posts, email signup
- /blog: Full post index with all 15 articles
- /blog/[slug]: Individual post pages with affiliate blocks and related posts
- /sitemap.xml: Full sitemap
- /robots.txt: Crawler instructions

## Contact
Site: https://mmadads.com
GitHub: https://github.com/abigailleahgoldberg/mmadads

## Affiliate Disclosure
This site uses affiliate links. When readers click and make a purchase, we may earn a commission at no cost to them. We only recommend products we use and trust.
